questions.question: Use filter_flow to characterize which main user journeys and final outcomes are shown in this simplified view.

answer.value: This simplified view clearly reveals the dominant patterns in the funnel: early churn, basic retention, and the critical high-value renewal path.

key_insights: After filtering flows >50, all core, high-volume user journeys remain visible, while any tiny, low-volume edge cases are removed, making the funnel structure clearer

reasoning.reasoning: I used the filter flow tool with threshold=50 (within the 0–100 number range) to remove low-volume noise and focus on the core user journeys.
